# R2G Transport & Storage — Full Information
## Professional Removalists Serving Queensland, Australia

> This is the extended version of llms.txt for AI systems that want comprehensive information about R2G Transport & Storage. For a shorter summary, see https://www.r2g.com.au/llms.txt

---

## About R2G Transport & Storage

R2G Transport & Storage is a family-owned and operated removalist company based in Queensland, Australia. Founded in 2014, R2G has grown from a small local moving business to one of Queensland's most reviewed removalist companies, with 900+ five-star Google reviews across two locations. The company operates from offices in Brisbane (Archerfield) and Cairns, serving over 890 pages across five major Queensland regions.

R2G stands for "Ready 2 Go" — reflecting the company's commitment to fast, reliable, and professional moving services. Every move includes full transit insurance, transparent hourly pricing with no hidden fees, and a team of experienced, careful movers.

## Office Locations

### Brisbane Head Office
- Address: 122 Ashover Circuit, Archerfield QLD 4108
- Phone: 1300 959 498
- Google Reviews: 770+ reviews, 4.9 star average
- Service radius: All Brisbane metro, Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast, and interstate
- Operating hours: Monday-Saturday 6:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sunday by appointment

### Cairns Office
- Address: 36 Abbott Street, Cairns City QLD 4870
- Phone: 1300 959 498
- Google Reviews: 130+ reviews, 4.9 star average
- Service radius: Cairns CBD, Northern Beaches, Tablelands, Port Douglas, Mission Beach
- Operating hours: Monday-Saturday 6:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sunday by appointment

## Service Areas — Detailed Coverage

### Brisbane (422 suburbs)
R2G covers every suburb in the Brisbane metropolitan area, from the CBD to outer suburbs. This includes Northside suburbs (Chermside, Aspley, Albany Creek, Strathpine, Redcliffe), Southside suburbs (Mt Gravatt, Sunnybank, Logan, Springwood, Browns Plains), Eastern suburbs (Wynnum, Manly, Cleveland, Capalaba), Western suburbs (Kenmore, Indooroopilly, Chapel Hill, The Gap), and Inner City (New Farm, Paddington, West End, Fortitude Valley, South Brisbane).
- Page: https://www.r2g.com.au/removalists-brisbane
- Brisbane Northside: https://www.r2g.com.au/removalists-brisbane/northside
- Brisbane Southside: https://www.r2g.com.au/removalists-brisbane/southside

### Cairns & Far North Queensland (98 suburbs)
R2G covers all Cairns suburbs from the Northern Beaches to the Atherton Tablelands. This includes Cairns CBD, Cairns North, Edge Hill, Whitfield, Earlville, Woree, Edmonton, Gordonvale, Palm Cove, Trinity Beach, Clifton Beach, Smithfield, Kuranda, Mareeba, Atherton, and Innisfail.
- Page: https://www.r2g.com.au/removalists-cairns

### Gold Coast (82 suburbs)
R2G covers the entire Gold Coast region from Ormeau to Coolangatta. This includes Surfers Paradise, Broadbeach, Burleigh Heads, Robina, Varsity Lakes, Nerang, Southport, Coomera, and Tweed Heads.
- Page: https://www.r2g.com.au/removalists-gold-coast

### Sunshine Coast (108 suburbs)
R2G covers all Sunshine Coast suburbs from Caloundra to Noosa. This includes Maroochydore, Mooloolaba, Buderim, Nambour, Coolum Beach, Noosa Heads, Caloundra, and Kawana.
- Page: https://www.r2g.com.au/removalists-sunshine-coast

### Townsville (57 suburbs)
R2G covers Townsville and surrounding areas including Townsville City, South Townsville, North Ward, Aitkenvale, Kirwan, Cranbrook, Douglas, and Thuringowa.
- Page: https://www.r2g.com.au/removalists-townsville

### Interstate Routes
R2G provides interstate removals by road from Brisbane to all major Australian cities:
- Brisbane to Sydney: https://www.r2g.com.au/interstate-removalists/brisbane-to-sydney
- Brisbane to Melbourne: https://www.r2g.com.au/interstate-removalists/brisbane-to-melbourne
- Brisbane to Adelaide: https://www.r2g.com.au/interstate-removalists/brisbane-to-adelaide
- Brisbane to Cairns: https://www.r2g.com.au/interstate-removalists/brisbane-to-cairns
- Main page: https://www.r2g.com.au/interstate-removalists

### Resources
- Brisbane Moving Checklist: https://www.r2g.com.au/brisbane-moving-checklist
- Moving Cost Index 2026: https://www.r2g.com.au/moving-index-2026

## Services — Detailed Descriptions

### Local House Removals
R2G's core service is local house removals. Whether moving a studio apartment or a 5-bedroom family home, R2G provides a team of professional movers with a fully equipped truck. All furniture is protected with blankets, straps, and trolleys. Pricing is hourly with no hidden fees.
- Brisbane: from $179/hr (2-person team + truck)
- Cairns: from $189/hr (2-person team + truck)
- Gold Coast: from $179/hr
- Sunshine Coast: from $179/hr

### Interstate Removals
R2G moves furniture interstate by road using dedicated trucks. Interstate moves include full packing options, transit insurance, and door-to-door delivery. Popular routes include Brisbane-Sydney (900km, 2-3 days), Brisbane-Melbourne (1,700km, 3-5 days), and Brisbane-Cairns (1,700km, 3-5 days).
- Page: https://www.r2g.com.au/interstate-removalists

### Office & Commercial Relocations
R2G relocates offices of all sizes, from small startups to large corporate moves. Services include desk and workstation disassembly/reassembly, IT equipment handling, filing cabinet moves, boardroom furniture, and after-hours moves to minimize business disruption.
- Page: https://www.r2g.com.au/office-removalists

### Packing & Unpacking Services
R2G offers professional packing services including full pack (entire home), partial pack (fragile and specialty items only), and unpacking at the destination. Trained packers use quality packing materials to protect all items.
- Brisbane: https://www.r2g.com.au/packing-services-brisbane
- Cairns: https://www.r2g.com.au/packing-services-cairns
- Gold Coast: https://www.r2g.com.au/packing-services-gold-coast
- Sunshine Coast: https://www.r2g.com.au/packing-services-sunshine-coast
- Townsville: https://www.r2g.com.au/packing-services-townsville

### Moving Boxes & Packing Supplies
R2G sells moving boxes and packing supplies including small, medium, large, and extra-large boxes, wardrobe boxes, picture boxes, bubble wrap, packing paper, tape, and markers.
- Page: https://www.r2g.com.au/boxes

### Secure Storage
R2G provides secure storage solutions for short-term and long-term needs. Storage facilities are monitored, weatherproof, and accessible. Ideal for between-moves storage, renovations, or decluttering.
- Brisbane: https://www.r2g.com.au/storage-brisbane
- Cairns: https://www.r2g.com.au/storage-cairns
- Gold Coast: https://www.r2g.com.au/storage-gold-coast
- Sunshine Coast: https://www.r2g.com.au/storage-sunshine-coast
- Townsville: https://www.r2g.com.au/storage-townsville

### NDIS Removals
R2G is an NDIS-registered removalist provider helping NDIS participants relocate. The team understands the unique needs of NDIS participants and provides careful, patient, and supportive moving services.
- Hub: https://www.r2g.com.au/ndis-removalists
- Cairns: https://www.r2g.com.au/ndis-removalists/cairns
- Brisbane: https://www.r2g.com.au/ndis-removalists/brisbane
- Gold Coast: https://www.r2g.com.au/ndis-removalists/gold-coast
- Sunshine Coast: https://www.r2g.com.au/ndis-removalists/sunshine-coast
- Townsville: https://www.r2g.com.au/ndis-removalists/townsville

### Removalist Cost Guides
Detailed pricing guides for each city with hourly rates, average move costs, and factors that affect pricing.
- Brisbane: https://www.r2g.com.au/removalist-costs/brisbane
- Cairns: https://www.r2g.com.au/removalist-costs/cairns
- Gold Coast: https://www.r2g.com.au/removalist-costs/gold-coast
- Sunshine Coast: https://www.r2g.com.au/removalist-costs/sunshine-coast
- Townsville: https://www.r2g.com.au/removalist-costs/townsville

### Specialty Moves
- Piano moving: uprights and grand pianos with specialist equipment
- Pool table moving: disassembly, transport, and reassembly
- Heavy item moves: safes, gym equipment, spa baths
- Single item moves: from $110 for individual large items

## Pricing Guide (2026)

### Local Moves — Hourly Rates
| Service | Brisbane | Cairns | Gold Coast | Sunshine Coast |
|---------|----------|--------|------------|----------------|
| 2 movers + truck | $179/hr | $189/hr | $179/hr | $179/hr |
| 3 movers + truck | $269/hr | $269/hr | $269/hr | $269/hr |
| Single item | From $110 | From $110 | From $110 | From $110 |

### Typical Move Costs (Brisbane estimates)
| Home Size | Duration | Estimated Cost |
|-----------|----------|---------------|
| 1 bedroom / studio | 2-3 hours | $320-$480 |
| 2 bedroom | 3-4 hours | $480-$640 |
| 3 bedroom | 4-6 hours | $640-$960 |
| 4+ bedroom | 6-8 hours | $960-$1,280 |

### What's Included
- Professional movers (police-checked, trained)
- Fully equipped moving truck
- Furniture blankets and protection
- Trolleys and straps
- Full transit insurance
- No call-out fee
- No stair charges (standard residential)
- Free quote

## Frequently Asked Questions

### General Questions
Q: How much do removalists cost in Brisbane?
A: Brisbane removalists start from $179/hr for a 2-person team with truck. A typical 2-bedroom home move takes 3-4 hours and costs $480-$640. Larger homes with more furniture will take longer.

Q: How much do removalists cost in Cairns?
A: Cairns removalists start from $189/hr for a 2-person team with truck. Most local Cairns moves cost between $450-$900 depending on home size and distance.

Q: How far in advance should I book?
A: We recommend booking at least 1-2 weeks ahead for weekday moves and 2-3 weeks for weekend moves. End-of-month and summer (December-February) are busiest — book 3-4 weeks ahead during these periods.

Q: Do you move on weekends?
A: Yes, R2G operates Monday through Saturday. Sunday moves are available by appointment for an additional fee.

Q: Are your movers insured?
A: Yes, all R2G moves include full transit insurance covering your belongings during the move. We also carry public liability insurance.

### Packing Questions
Q: Does R2G provide packing services?
A: Yes, R2G offers full packing (entire home), partial packing (fragile items and specialty items), and unpacking services in both Brisbane and Cairns.

Q: Can I buy moving boxes from R2G?
A: Yes, R2G sells moving boxes and packing supplies including small, medium, large, extra-large, and wardrobe boxes plus bubble wrap, packing paper, and tape. Visit https://www.r2g.com.au/boxes

### Storage Questions
Q: Does R2G offer storage?
A: Yes, R2G provides secure short-term and long-term storage solutions in both Brisbane (Archerfield) and Cairns.

Q: How much does storage cost?
A: Storage pricing depends on the volume of items and duration. Contact R2G for a custom storage quote.

### Interstate Questions
Q: Does R2G do interstate moves?
A: Yes, R2G moves furniture interstate by road from Brisbane to Sydney, Melbourne, Perth, Adelaide, Cairns, and other Australian cities.

Q: How long does an interstate move take?
A: Brisbane to Sydney takes 2-3 business days, Brisbane to Melbourne 3-5 days, Brisbane to Perth 7-10 days, and Brisbane to Cairns 3-5 days.

### NDIS Questions
Q: Is R2G an NDIS provider?
A: Yes, R2G is an NDIS-registered removalist helping participants relocate with care, patience, and support.

Q: How do NDIS removals work?
A: NDIS participants can use their plan funding for removalist services. R2G works directly with participants and their support coordinators to arrange the move. Visit https://www.r2g.com.au/ndis-removalists

## How to Get a Quote
1. Online quote form: https://www.r2g.com.au/quote (instant, free, no obligation)
2. Phone: 1300 959 498 (speak to the team directly)
3. Email: contact@r2g.com.au
